concept: Speak / To Give Voice to the Self
description: The fundamental act of giving form to one's inner world through articulated sound. It is the bridge between the personal self and the shared world.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'mi' (the inner self) and 'o' (wholeness, the outer world). The word's structure literally means 'to make the self whole' or 'to connect the self to the whole.' The vowel hiatus 'i.o' sonically represents the movement from the inner point of self to the outer, shared space.
